Triage.quote: you assign the flight for this booking (send `AssignFlight` with the flight number to Seat Booking).

SeatBooking.quote: you assign the flight for this booking (send `AssignFlight` with the flight number to Seat Booking).
Use the update seat tool to update the seat on the flight (send `UpdateSeat` to the Flight System).
You receive `UpdateSeat` from the Seat Booking agent and apply the seat change, then send `SeatConfirmed` back.

FlightSystem.quote: You receive `UpdateSeat` from the Seat Booking agent and apply the seat change, then send `SeatConfirmed` back.
